\tzpentry{ID4032}{Number Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4032 introduces Number Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\\nH = \\\\sum_{i=1}^{N} \\\\frac{p_i^2}{2m_i} + V(q)\\n\\\\end{equation}
